overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city street (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring neon-lit buildings, futuristic vehicles, and a mix of traditional Japanese and modern architecture. The camera moves steadily through the environment, passing from a busy street into a plaza with a torii gate and past various storefronts.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk observing passing traffic and neon signs

entered.detail: sleek white futuristic vehicle with black accents driving along the street
large pink billboard with german text ZEIG DICH and character image
tall cylindrical building with spiral architecture and glass facade
red building covered with multiple glowing neon signs and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a futuristic city street lined with neon-lit buildings. A white sports car passes by on the left while the camera walks forward along the tiled sidewalk. The prominent ZEIG DICH billboard and a tall spiral skyscraper dominate the center of the view ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: city intersection with adult entertainment district signage

events.description: camera turns left at intersection to face red building with prominent neon signage

entered.detail: curved red building with large glowing red neon 18+ sign and multiple windows
vertical neon sign with japanese characters reading Fuyutsuki

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left at the intersection, revealing a distinctive red building with a large 18+ neon sign. The spiral skyscraper shifts to the right side of the frame as the camera crosses the asphalt street, passing by the Fuyutsuki sign.

large digital screen displaying WET DREAM text with monochrome image
large circular purple planter containing green shrubs

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a spacious plaza dominated by a large red torii gate ahead. The camera walks forward passing through the gate while pedestrians move through the space. A large digital billboard displaying WET DREAM is visible on the left, and a purple planter sits near the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with small restaurants and vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking along the shop fronts observing NPCs near the noodle shop entrance

person with red hair sitting at small red table outside the shop

green vending machine with glowing display next to the noodle shop

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a more enclosed covered walkway lined with shops. A Korean noodle shop with bright signage is prominent on the right, where two NPCs are gathered—one standing and one sitting at a table. The WET DREAM billboard is now visible in the distance behind.

events.description: crossing the street while observing passing vehicles including a small three-wheeled car

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and observing the flow of futuristic traffic

notable_agents.action: small compact three-wheeled car driving down the street

entered.detail: large building entrance with prominent red staircase and tall columns with red lighting
small boxy three-wheeled vehicle with exposed rear section driving on the road

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the multi-lane street, revealing a large building entrance with distinctive red stairs across the road. Various futuristic vehicles pass by, including a notable small three-wheeled car driving in the center lane. The environment opens up to show more of the city's traffic infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched cyberpunk district that transitions from a wide city street into a traditional plaza and finally toward a bustling traffic hub. It begins on a tiled sidewalk beneath a towering spiral skyscraper and a ZEIG DICH billboard, moving forward as a white sports car streaks past. As the camera turns left at an intersection, the view shifts past a red building with an 18+ sign and the Fuyutsuki storefront before crossing the asphalt. The scene then opens into a spacious plaza where the camera passes through a large red torii gate, gliding past pedestrians and a WET DREAM digital billboard. This path leads into a covered walkway lined with shops, including a bright Korean noodle shop, before finally crossing a multi-lane street filled with futuristic vehicles and three-wheeled cars toward a building entrance with distinctive red stairs.
